environment: pure-Python sandbox (no numpy/native backend; egress-limited) — figures are local & machine-dependent; re-run benchmarks/measure.py to refresh.

tests_passing.method: run the full test_build.py suite in-process; count tests that pass (no oracle bypass).

verifier_false_positives.method: run the Clover spec-gate over a corpus of REAL + vacuous specs; count real specs wrongly rejected.

vacuous_specs_caught.method: same gate run; count deliberately-vacuous/contradictory specs correctly flagged.

autofix_solved.method: run the write→verify→fix loop on a seeded-bug corpus; count tasks reaching a verified fix; `wrong` (claimed-fixed-but-not) must be 0.

proof_reuse_speedup.method: prove a batch of obligations cold (SMT solver) then warm (structural cache); wall-clock ratio (verdicts are identical — lossless).

fold_scale_speedup.method: prove a parametric template ONCE then certify N=150 instances by a cheap side-condition check, vs N independent SMT proofs; wall-clock ratio (the gap widens with N).

eqsat_node_reduction.method: saturate an e-graph with sound ring rewrites, extract the lowest-cost equivalent term, PROVE input==output with Z3; report node-count reduction (e.g. x*2+x*3 → 5*x).

parallel_speedup.method: reduce(+, square(i) for i in 0..2,000,000) split across processes vs sequential; wall-clock ratio, with the parallel result verified equal to the sequential one.

fold_coverage_now.method: route each loop in the fixed defer corpus to its technique (Kovacic/Ben-Or-Tiwari/q-Gosper), each behind its own SOUND verifier; count FOLDED. baseline = current engine. Clock C fold rate only (ABFT is Clock B, counted separately). false_folds (a negative control folded) must be 0.

fold_soup_lemmas.method: brew genuinely-distinct fold families offline; each individually verified (induction-PIT / companion≡naive), deduped by canonical signature. Counts MEASURED; meta-families vs instances reported distinctly (no artificial splitting). ε₀-via-Lean BLOCKED (Lean unavailable).

fold_runtime_no_regression.method: [Clock C] median-of-k before(naive loop)/after(O(1) soup lookup + closed-form eval) at n=1e5; the AFTER path must not be slower (first success condition). Lookup is O(1) in library size.

finite_check_strength.epsilon0: NOT used (PRA suffices for fold; ε₀ never arises)
finite_check_strength.method: verify ∀n sum identities by the uniqueness meta-theorem (common recurrence via PIT + finite initial values). PRA (ω^ω), NOT ε₀. Equality only — inequality/positivity deferred.

rust_ntt_speedup.unit: x (Rust NTT vs same-algorithm Python NTT)
rust_ntt_speedup.method: dependency-0 std-only Rust cdylib (no flint/faer/PyO3) called via ctypes; NTT poly-mul mod 998244353; differential-tested IDENTICAL to the Python ground truth.

eps0_kernel_tcb.method: CNF<ε₀ ordinal descent kernel — INSURANCE for general recursion, NOT fold coverage (fold is PRA-complete). Gödel: cannot prove its own consistency. TCB trusts Python+arith+hardware.

blocked.reason: needs an API key + egress to a provider; not measurable in this sandbox (no key, gateway hosts off the egress allowlist).
